signal: seen.json structural bug: collection agent writes new URLs at JSON top level instead of inside 'entries' sub-dict. Dedup reads 'entries' only, so 18 URLs were invisible to dedup. Caused 3+ duplicate articles on 2026-03-18 (HorizonMath x2, State of Open Source HF x3).
action: Fixed seen.json data (merged 18 top-level URLs into entries). Added structural constraint + verification step to feed-collector SKILL.md v1.13.1 Step 5a. Added arXiv URL normalization rule.
